title: NextGuard for CreateAcademy
body:
# NextGuard Create Academy Distribution

**What is NextGuard?**
NextGuard is a mod that allows players to update their game files by downloading the latest mod versions directly from the server. In this case, mods will be downloaded from **createacademy.net**, specifically for the **Create Academy distribution**.

**What is Create Academy?**
Create Academy is a Minecraft server centered around the Create Mod. It’s a vibrant community where you can meet new people, make friends, build incredible machinery, create trains, and complete a wide variety of quests—ranging from building and exploring to even cooking!

⚠️ Be carefull, NextGuard will override every mod installed on the instance! I do not recomend using the mod by yourself, you should download Create Academy Modpack oe Create Academy Launcher instead 

```
I, Nyxef, creator of NextGuard, grant Create Academy and Toopa permission to use this distribution of Create Academy on their server.
```
